title: Quick Start Guide - Osprey/Tern - First screen, single earbud/pairing - zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide zoom in/out animation on earbud pairing screen does not match Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
In Device Settings, locate and tap on 'Quick Start Guide'.
On the Quick Start Guide screen, observe the first screen showing a single earbud and pairing instructions.
Tap the blue circle button on the screen.
Verify that the earbud zooms in and pairing text is displayed, matching the Figma design.
Tap the blue circle button again.
Verify that the view zooms out to the original screen showing the single earbud and pairing instructions.
expected: Tapping the blue circle button zooms in on the earbud with pairing text per Figma design. Tapping again zooms out to the original screen.
